The '''saw-toothed grank''' was a carnivore native to the [[Gungan Swamp]]s of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].<ref name="Field Guide" /> 

== Biology and appearance ==
They were a medium-sized species of predator/scavenger with sharp [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]] and powerful jaws. To hunt, they sensed vibrations through their [[Hair/Legends|hair]] from both the air and ground. They were the main predators of [[Shiro/Legends|shiros]], capable of breaking through the shell with their large, crushing jaws; sometimes, though, shiros that had formed symbiotic "[[shiro-trap]]" relationships with [[Tooke-trap plant/Legends|tooke-trap plants]] could easily camouflage themselves from granks and certain other lethal predators.<ref name="Field Guide" />

[[File:Saw-toothed granks on Coruscant.jpg|thumb|left|240px|Saw-toothed granks on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]]]
They would also occasionally hunt [[Narglatch/Legends|narglatch]] cubs, though they would fear predation from adult narglatches.

[[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] found the taste of granks very appealing and would fry them. The toenails of granks were used to create [[Bongo]] engine parts, while their meat was a delicacy served in high-end restaurants.

On [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], imported saw-toothed granks were sold as pets or zoo animals. Sometimes, like other imported non-sapient creatures to Coruscant, granks escaped and, like Coruscant's escaped imported [[Anooba/Legends|anoobas]] and [[Veermok/Legends|veermoks]], ranged the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|lower levels]] of the city-planet and feasted upon garbage and unfortunate lifeforms.<ref name="Field Guide" />
